tldr: Isaac del Toro took the canonical Liwa Palace uphill finish in a UAE 1-2-3 — well, 1-and-then-Decathlon-and-Bahrain — to open the race in the leader's jersey. 144 km, wind-shortened from the planned route, decided on the closing uphill drag.

narrative.headline: Del Toro at Liwa
narrative.body: 144 km from Madinat Zayed Majlis to Liwa Palace, wind-shortened, draggy uphill finish. Del Toro launched the decisive attack inside the closing kilometre; Bol couldn't match the kick, Tiberi held for third for Bahrain Victorious — a strong stage and GC opener for the team's protected climber.

gcImpact.headline: Del Toro into the leader's jersey
gcImpact.body: Time bonuses (10-6-4) for the top three at Liwa established the early GC; Del Toro in the jersey.

sources.title: UAE Tour Stage 1 — Del Toro at Liwa Palace
